author: Daniel
content: Missing you and waiting for tomorrow. \nI got a little surprise for you when you arrive! :)
title: Awaiter of Echo

author: Echo
content: "I am thinking of you too! Then I checked if you left me something here, and you did!!! I felt soooo warm and loved.\n\nMiss you a lot! Hope Thursday comes faster, and faster..."
title: Lover of Daniel

author: Daniel
content: 我亲爱的笛云！\n我爱你，我还要跟你计划我们的未来。\n你想做我的女朋友吗？
title: Echologist

author: Daniel
content:
"Echo!!!
It's only two more nights, going to sleep and waking up alone until we are reunited. I feel like a young child counting down the days until my birthday :) 
You're the best gift I could ever ask for in my entire life! 
I love you and look forward to seeing you. 
Yours, 
Daniel"
title: Birthday boy

author: Echo
content:
"BéBé,

Je t'aime!! I can't describe how happy i am now. Seeing you, going to see you, it seems become the number one happiness in my life now. Nothing else really matters at this point to be honest.

I'm imaging how i am gonna hug you, touch you, kiss you, feel you in my hand again, how wonderful is that! 

I can't wait tmr to come, you said birthday boy, for me it's like the elementary school picnic day with all friends, the day before we will go buying snacks together, and i won't touch any snacks until the next day. (It's like right now i won't touch myself until the next day hahah lol!!)

I couldn't imagine that i am loving someone this much right now, thanks for letting me know how good life can be. Just by loving you, my life is so much brighter. 

See you tomorrow my love LITERALLY!!!

Love you,
Echo"
title: happy Echo who is coming to see my bebe!

author: Echo
content: I can't wait to see you!!!

author: Daniel
content:
"我亲爱的！
One week ago we sat in an Uber on the way to the airport. 
We went to the gate, hand in hand. We stood embracing each other, physically encircling each other. 

I watched you stand in line, turn around and smile and wave at me. I saw you through a sea of people, a shining striped beacon whose light stands out from afar. 

The distance increased, I could no longer see you but I knew you were still close. You made me realize that distance is just a number. Whether you're in Paris or a couple hundred feet from me obscured by the airport walls, we keep one another with us in our hearts, wherever we go (+ Whatsapp helps a lot haha). 

I miss you, but all that separates us is distance. I yearn for the day I can hold you in my arms again, soon. 

Love, 
Daniel - Misser of Echo"
title: Misser of Echo
